title: Better Vanilla
description: Better Vanilla is a modpack designed to enhance the vanilla experience without altering the original gameplay.
body:
![titre mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/524009c9a4412bb9b9b8754e77263661e0ce5f65.png)

## 🎮 Description

**Better Vanilla** is a lightweight, optimized modpack for Minecraft 1.21.5 on Fabric, designed to enhance the vanilla experience without distorting the original gameplay. 🎮

This pack provides visual, performance, and quality of life improvements to make your adventure smoother and more immersive, while retaining the spirit of classic Minecraft. ⛏️

For any help, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/KYaRtM2GaB).

## ✨ Key Features:

* **Performance Optimizations** with Lithium, FerriteCore, Phosphor, and Dynamic FPS 🚀
* **Subtle Visual Improvements** with Iris, Better Clouds , PresenceFootsteps , and Better Biome Blend ⚡
* **Enhanced Gameplay** with AppleSkin, Better Third Person  (improved 3rd-person view), Chat Heads , and PickUpNotifier 🍎
* **Convenient Recipe Management** with Roughly Enough Items (REI) and easy setup via Cloth Config 👀
* **Useful Features** like Accurate Block Placement Reborn To improve block placement and Mouse Tweaks for better recipe management Inventory 📦
* **Fabric compatibility** guaranteed for fast and stable loading 📚

## 🚀 Who is it for?

This modpack is perfect for players who want an improved, smooth, and beautiful Minecraft experience, without adding a ton of complex mods or changing the vanilla style. 🎯

## ⚙️ Installation

Compatible with Fabric Loader 1.21.5. Simply place the mods folder in your Minecraft directory and enjoy!
